metadata.title: Background Image
metadata.description: This allows you to specify a remote URL as the background image, and a few settings to tweak the experience.

regex.source: text: "The URL needs to be a remote resource, and does not yet (or at least not on my machine) support local files."
regex.target: text: "URL需要是远程资源，并且还不支持本地文件（或者至少在我的计算机上不支持）。"

regex.source: text: "Some of the other settings, like opacity, bluriness, and input contrast, are helpers to tweak your experience."
regex.target: text: "其他一些设置，如不透明度、模糊度和输入对比度，是调整体验的助手。"

regex.source: .setDesc("URL for the background image to load.")
.setDesc("Opacity of the background image should be between 0% and 100%.")
regex.target: .setDesc("背景图像的不透明度应在0%和100%之间。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Increasing the blur can help make the text more legible.")
regex.target: .setDesc("增加模糊度有助于使文本更清晰。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This adds a translucent background for the input area, to help improve legibility.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这为输入区域添加了半透明背景，以帮助提高易读性。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Enable to increase the contrast of the input area.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("启用以增加输入区域的对比度。")
